word: G1500 - εἰκῆ - eikē - i-kay' - Without a cause

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Without a cause
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
inconsiderately, without purpose, without just cause
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Probably from G1502 (through the idea of failure); idly, that is, without reason (or effect): - without a cause, (in) vain (-ly.)
